name: Zendure Power Control (Auto-Discovery)
description: Controls a Zendure power station with automatic network discovery (v2.0.1: Added smartMode flag)

description_lng.de: Steuert eine Zendure Powerstation mit automatischer Netzwerk-Erkennung (v2.0.1: smartMode Flag hinzugefügt)

author: TheSolarApp

parameters.name: SERIAL
parameters.label: Serial Number
parameters.description: Serial number of the Zendure power station

parameters.name: REVERSE_STARTUP_POWER
parameters.label: Charging Mode Startup Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to start charging mode

parameters.name: REVERSE_STOP_POWER
parameters.label: Charging Mode Stop Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to stop charging mode

parameters.name: STARTUP_POWER
parameters.label: Discharge Mode Startup Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to start discharge mode

parameters.name: STOP_POWER
parameters.label: Discharge Mode Stop Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to stop discharge mode

parameters.name: CHECK_WIFI_AP
parameters.label: Check Ap Network
parameters.description: searches ap-network of shelly for zendure power station

description_lng.de: Durchsucht Shelly Ap-Netzwerk nach Zendure Speicher

parameters.name: CHECK_WIFI_STA
parameters.label: Check Wifi Network
parameters.description: searches Wifi-network of shelly for zendure power station

description_lng.de: Durchsucht Shelly Wifi-Netzwerk nach Zendure Speicher

parameters.name: CHECK_ETH
parameters.label: Check Ethernet Network
parameters.description: searches LAN-network of shelly for zendure power station

description_lng.de: Durchsucht Shelly LAN-Netzwerk nach Zendure Speicher
